87:7: إِلَّا مَا ش<tajweed class=madda_obligatory>َا</tajweed>ٓءَ <tajweed class=ham_wasl>ٱ</tajweed>للَّهُ‌ۚ إِ<tajweed class=ghunnah>نّ</tajweed>َهُ<tajweed class=madda_normal>ۥ</tajweed> يَعْلَمُ <tajweed class=ham_wasl>ٱ</tajweed>لْجَهْرَ وَمَا يَخْفَىٰ
87:9: فَذَكِّرْ إ<tajweed class=idgham_ghunnah>ِن ن</tajweed>َّفَعَتِ <tajweed class=ham_wasl>ٱ</tajweed><tajweed class=laam_shamsiyah>ل</tajweed>ذِّكْرَىٰ
87:12: ٱلَّذِى يَصْلَى <tajweed class=ham_wasl>ٱ</tajweed><tajweed class=laam_shamsiyah>ل</tajweed><tajweed class=ghunnah>نّ</tajweed>َارَ <tajweed class=ham_wasl>ٱ</tajweed>لْكُ<tajweed class=qalaqah>بْ</tajweed>رَىٰ
87:13: ثُ<tajweed class=ghunnah>مّ</tajweed>َ لَا يَمُوتُ فِيهَا وَلَا يَحْيَىٰ
87:14: قَ<tajweed class=qalaqah>دْ</tajweed> أَفْلَحَ مَ<tajweed class=ikhafa>ن ت</tajweed>َزَكَّىٰ
87:16: بَلْ تُؤْثِرُونَ <tajweed class=ham_wasl>ٱ</tajweed>لْحَيَ<tajweed class=slnt>و</tajweed><tajweed class=madda_normal>ٲ</tajweed>ةَ <tajweed class=ham_wasl>ٱ</tajweed><tajweed class=laam_shamsiyah>ل</tajweed>دُّنْيَا
87:17: وَ<tajweed class=ham_wasl>ٱ</tajweed>لْأَخِرَةُ خَيْ<tajweed class=idgham_ghunnah>رٌ و</tajweed>َأَ<tajweed class=qalaqah>بْ</tajweed>قَىٰٓ
87:18: إِ<tajweed class=ghunnah>نّ</tajweed>َ هَ<tajweed class=madda_normal>ـٰ</tajweed>ذَا لَفِى <tajweed class=ham_wasl>ٱ</tajweed><tajweed class=laam_shamsiyah>ل</tajweed>صُّحُفِ <tajweed class=ham_wasl>ٱ</tajweed>لْأُولَىٰ
